calendar.matters:
Petition For Orders 1 Order Compelling Trustee To Account 2 Redress Of Trustee Breaches 3 Suspension Of Trustee 4 Removal Of Trustee 5 Disallowance Of Compensation 6 Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Mutual Release Pursuant To California Code Of Civil 664.6
Off Calendar Sep-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Stidham appeared by zoom for Cynthia Cacatian (petitioner/successor trustee).
Justin Hedemark appeared by zoom for and with Luz Malinao (former trustee) by zoom.

Mr. Stidham and Mr. Hedemark stated that they believe that this is in the best interest of all the beneficiaries of the trust, that the settlement will allow distribution and that all of the beneficiaries were informed of the settlement and given the opportunity to attend the mediation. The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant as prayed. The Petition for Orders Compelling the Trustee to Account, etc. is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Tan. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Off Calendar

Petition For Orders 1 Order Compelling Trustee To Account 2 Redress Of Trustee Breaches 3 Suspension Of Trustee 4 Removal Of Trustee 5 Disallowance Of Compensation 6 Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Continued To Aug-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Stidham appeared by zoom for Cynthia Cacatian (petitioner).
Justin Hedemark appeared by zoom for Luz Malinao (trustee/respondent).

Mr. Stidham stated that the matter settled and that he anticipates filing a petition for approval of the settlement within a week or so. The Petition for Order Compelling Trustee to Account, etc. is continued to August 13, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of mediation is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

Petition For Orders 1 Order Compelling Trustee To Account 2 Redress Of Trustee Breaches 3 Suspension Of Trustee 4 Removal Of Trustee 5 Disallowance Of Compensation 6 Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Apr-23-2024 Continued To Jul-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Stidham appeared via zoom for Cynthia Cacatian (petitioner).
Justin Hedemark appeared via zoom for Luz Deleston (objector).

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 02, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 05, 2024. The matter is continued to July 09, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and the Parties are to return on July 09, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Papers to be filed by June 25, 2024.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

The Court orders the dismissal of the petition without prejudice, based on petitioner's counsel failed to appear.
